zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough於1540年10月27日出生在英國英格蘭波克夏藍布時，他的父親Lord Robert Cheney IV Earl30歲，母親Joane Harrison24歲。他於從大約1558年到1563年與Lady Frances Agnes BROUGHTON , countess cheney在英國英格蘭波克夏結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1574年10月27日在英國英格蘭波克夏享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough于1540年10月27日出生在英国英格兰波克夏藍布时，他的父亲Lord Robert Cheney IV Earl30岁，母亲Joane Harrison24岁。他于从大约1558年到1563年与Lady Frances Agnes BROUGHTON , countess cheney在英国英格兰波克夏结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1574年10月27日在英国英格兰波克夏享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Earl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English e(o)rl ‘earl’, a traditional English title of nobility equivalent in rank to French and Norman Count .

variants.name: Earle
meanings: English: variant of   Earl  .

variants.name: Harle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Johann, Kurt.
South German (Härle): nickname from a diminutive of Middle High German hār ‘hair’.

English (northern) and Scottish: habitational name from Kirkharle and Little Harle in Northumberland (earlier simply Herle, Harle), possibly named from an Old English personal name Herela (a derivative of various compound names with the first element here ‘army’) + Old English lēah ‘wood, clearing’.

variants.name: Earls
meanings: English: variant of Earl with genitival -s, denoting someone who was a member of an earl's household, or, with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Ireland, when this is not the English name, it is from Gaelic Mac an Iarla ‘son of the earl’.

variants.name: Hearl
meanings: English: variant of Earl with prosthetic H-.

variants.name: Count
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earll
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Earl  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough was born on 27 October 1540, in Lambourn, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Robert Cheney IV Earl, was 30 and his mother, Joane Harrison, was 24. He married Lady Frances Agnes BROUGHTON , countess cheney from about 1558 to 1563, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 27 October 1574, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough est né le 27 octobre 1540, à Lambourn, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Robert Cheney IV Earl, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joane Harrison, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Frances Agnes BROUGHTON , countess cheney du environ 1558 au 1563, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 27 octobre 1574, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough am 27. Oktober 1540 in Lambourn, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Robert Cheney IV Earl 30 und seine Mutter Joane Harrison 24. Er hat von um 1558 bis 1563 in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Frances Agnes BROUGHTON , countess cheney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Oktober 1574 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough è nato il il 27 ottobre 1540 nel Lambourn, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Robert Cheney IV Earl, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joane Harrison, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Frances Agnes BROUGHTON , countess cheney da circa 1558 a 1563, nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 27 ottobre 1574, nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lamboughが1540年10月27日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアランボウルンで生まれた時，父Lord Robert Cheney IV Earlは30歳，母Joane Harrisonは24歳であった。から約1558年まで1563年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアでLady Frances Agnes BROUGHTON , countess cheneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1574年10月27日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough(이)가 1540년 10월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 램우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Robert Cheney IV Earl(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Harrison(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1558년 부터 1563년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 Lady Frances Agnes BROUGHTON , countess cheney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1574년 10월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.27 October 1540–27 October 1574: 27 de outubro de 1540–27 de outubro de 1574
pt.of Waltham Abbey, Essex, England: Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough nasceu em 27 de outubro de 1540, em Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Robert Cheney IV Earl, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joane Harrison, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Frances Agnes BROUGHTON , countess cheney de aproximadamente 1558 a 1563, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1574, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough родился 27 октября 1540 г. в местности лэмбурн, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Robert Cheney IV Earl было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Harrison, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Frances Agnes BROUGHTON , countess cheney с около 1558 по 1563 в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 27 октября 1574 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Frances Agnes BROUGHTON , countess cheney desde aproximadamente 1558 hasta 1563, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1574, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
